description: The act of bringing inner truth into outer form through any medium. Expression encompasses verbal utterance, artistic creation, emotional manifestation, bodily gesture, and the understanding that expression is how the inner world meets the outer.
rationale: The word 'shoani' begins with gentle 'sho', opens through 'a' (creating vowel hiatus), and grounds in 'ni'. This three-syllable journey with fricative and hiatus captures expression as gentle emergence opening into grounded manifestation.
